properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can see the sun going down My time down here will soon be o’er I will hear the angels sing When I reach the golden shore.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Don’t weep, for me When they take me to my resting place I’ll shout and sing When I see my Saviour’s face.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Soon the stones will be rolled away, And the graves will open wide We’ll take our flight on angels’ wings And there with Jesus we’ll abide.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Don’t you weep when am crossing Jordan For you won’t have too long to wait You’ll be coming on some bright morning And I’ll meet you at the Eastern gate.
